description_long: This guard rail consists of four parallel horizontal bars supported by two vertical posts at each end. The bars and posts are cylindrical, giving the structure a sleek, industrial appearance. The entire object is finished in a glossy black color, suggesting a powder-coated or painted metal surface for weather resistance. The ends of the posts are capped, and the horizontal rails are attached with visible brackets or welds. There are no visible reflective markings or safety features on the rail. The design is minimalistic, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or parking lots to prevent pedestrian or vehicle access.
description: A glossy black metal guard rail with four horizontal cylindrical bars and two vertical posts, featuring a minimalistic, industrial design.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four horizontal bars and both vertical posts, highlighting the full width and structure.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the rail, with only the end of the posts and the thickness of the bars visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying all four horizontal bars and both posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the ends of the posts.
